subcategory: live prediction/betting card with countdown timer, voting bars, and betting slip overlay
use_cases: Live sports prediction markets where users bet on real-time outcomes with countdown timers
Real-time YES/NO voting systems with animated vote distribution bars
Betting slip overlays where users input amounts and confirm predictions
Sports betting platforms displaying team logos, odds, and total bank pools
Engagement tracking with player counts and chat/engagement icons
ai_summary: An interactive live prediction market card component featuring a countdown timer, animated YES/NO voting bars showing vote distribution, total bank pool tracking, and a slide-up betting slip overlay. Built with framer-motion for smooth animations and includes engagement metrics like player counts. Designed for sports betting and prediction platform UIs with responsive layout support.
